title: Pakistan Strikes Bagram Air Base, Satellite Images Show
author: Elian Peltier, Christiaan Triebert and Yaqoob Akbary
fullText: Satellite imagery showed flattened warehouses at the base that served as the nerve center of America’s 20-year war in Afghanistan, a prized asset for the Taliban.
summary: Satellite imagery showed flattened warehouses at the base that served as the nerve center of America’s 20-year war in Afghanistan, a prized asset for the Taliban.
